mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID , LOGIN_ID , PASSWORD , NAME , ROLE , CREATED_AT , UPDATED_AT FROM USER_ACCOUNT WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginID}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_ACCOUNT ( USER_ID, LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD, NAME, ROLE, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( user_account_seq.nextval, #{loginId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{role}, SYSDATE )
